response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior generalist with deep experience in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/full-stack systems, but the role requires 5–10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows with SQL Server/Oracle and fixed-income or capital-markets domain expertise. C++ exposure is limited to a 7-month stint at National Instruments (2014–2015) and a bachelor's thesis project; there is no SQL Server/Oracle experience, no Windows-platform focus, and no financial-services or capital-markets background. The core mandatory requirements are not met.
strengths: Substantial senior-level software engineering experience across multiple stacks and domains
Strong software craftsmanship practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, pairing
concerns: Minimal recent C++ experience; primary languages are TypeScript/Node.js and DLang
No SQL Server or Oracle experience indicated; SQL exposure appears limited
No fixed-income, capital-markets, or investment-banking domain background
